innateAbility.name: Lunar Blessing
innateAbility.description: Grants allied heroes bonus attack damage within the radius.Lunar Blessing is more effective on Luna.

abilities.name: Lucent Beam
abilities.description: Calls a beam of lunar energy down upon an enemy, damaging and briefly stunning them.

abilities.name: Lunar Orbit
abilities.description: Luna's glaive spirals out, rotates around her, and instantly attacks collided enemy units for a portion of her attack damage.

abilities.name: Moon Glaives
abilities.description: Luna's attacks bounce between enemy units, and deals lesser damage per bounce.

abilities.name: Eclipse
abilities.description: Temporary obscures the sun, turning the day into night, while showering enemy units with lucent strikes in a radius around Luna.There is a max number of times that a single target can be struck per cast.

talents.right: +25 Lunar Blessing Flat Attack Damage Bonus

talents.left: 1.5x Lunar Orbit Orbit Speed/Instant Attack Damage
